allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\('\\n'.join\(f'{k}: {v}' for k in sorted\(deps\) if any\(x in k for x in ['lucide','expo','react-native','reanimated','linear']\)\)\)")
